title: IRS Publishes Notice for Clean Fuel Production Credit 2025 Section 45Z Inflation Adjustment Factor and Applicable Amount
content: This notice publishes the inflation adjustment factors and applicable amounts, as appropriate, for calendar year 2025 for the clean fuel production credit under Â§ 45Z of the Code (the Â§ 45Z credit). These inflation adjustment factors and applicable amounts, as appropriate, are used to determine the corresponding credit amounts under 45Z of the Code. Section 45Z(a)(1) provides that, for purposes of Â§ 38, the Â§ 45Z credit for any taxable year is an amount equal to the product of (i) the applicable amount per gallon (or gallon equivalent) with respect to any transportation fuel which is produced by the taxpayer at a qualified facility and sold by the taxpayer in a specific manner during the taxable year, and (ii) the emissions factor for such fuel as determined under Â§ 45Z(b).
author: Analysts Account
